description: The main objective of this pipeline is to remove columns from a table. The pipeline starts with the node 'd6ce2132-6d55-4a79-bd00-bf722c6c0193' which provides input for the nodes 'e7414e56-c4c2-45af-bf65-6c07e755e56a', '7ebf7e30-563d-4c30-b13a-d506a99e336a', and '980ce2eb-df41-43ed-9f8a-0d75b6fac90f' that remove columns from a table.

e7414e56-c4c2-45af-bf65-6c07e755e56a.name: table-remove-columns
e7414e56-c4c2-45af-bf65-6c07e755e56a.description: Removes one or multiple columns by name
